text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's student council business has
been particularly demanding today. Seeing that
she's starting to flag, I encourage her to take a
break.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I doubt I am half as tired as you think, but I see
your point. There are plenty more meetings to
attend come afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Perhaps forty winks would help steady me for the task ahead.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Where am I? I could have sworn I was in the
infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, there are some people over there.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though I've seen them somewhere
before... Wait, could they be... the Three
Goddesses?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've heard they appear in dreams to grant the
dreamer's wishes, but I thought it was a frivolous
rumor...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Three Goddesses seem to hear Symboli
Rudolf's voice. They turn toward her and
approach slowly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I need no such assistance. I will seize my
dreams myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My path is my own. I require no aid to walk it, be
it from goddesses or anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Three Goddesses smile serenely. A bright
light fills the surroundings...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: As I thought... It was just a dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, I feel somehow lighter. Taking a break was a
wise choice, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf comes back at full strength and
throws herself into the afternoon's work. Her nap
seems to have paid dividends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Three Goddesses nod sagely. A bright light
fills the surroundings...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no time like the present. The
afternoon's work awaits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf casts a glance out of the window
to find that it's already dark.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It can't be... Did I oversleep? How embarrassing...
